name: Apple and Pork Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 Tart Cooking Apple, peeled and sliced
1 Small Sweet Red Pepper, seeded and cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the cooking apple; seed and cut the red pepper into thin strips.
2. Heat oil in a heavy frying pan over medium-high heat.
3. Cook pork chops until browned on both sides and almost cooked through; remove from pan and set aside.
4. Cook onion, garlic, apple slices, and red pepper strips for 2 minutes or until softened.
5. Blend chicken stock with cornstarch; stir into the pan along with curry powder, cumin, and cinnamon. Cook for 1-2 minutes until slightly reduced and thickened.
6. Return pork chops to the pan; season with salt and pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
7. Serve pork chops with sauce, sprinkled with fresh chopped parsley or coriander.
8. Serve with quick-cooking couscous flavored with chopped green onions and raisins. Serves 4.
